1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram
Asaph, the name of three Israelites, and of the family of the first
properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
2.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent
2.kj: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom]

2.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
2.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

2.gl: Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
2.dv: from H8280 (שָׂרָה) and H410 (אֵל); he will rule as God;

3.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
3.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

3.gl: {an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum)}
3.dv: or מְעֹנָה; feminine of H4583 (מָעוֹן), and meaning the same

3.gl: Tsijon (as a permanent capital), a mountain of Jerusalem
3.dv: the same (regularly) as H6725 (צִיּוּן)lemma צִיוּן missing dagesh, corrected to צִיּוּן;

3.gl: a hut (as of entwined boughs); also a lair
Shalem, an early name of Jerusalem

4.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
4.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
4.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

4.gl: a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler); figuratively, a protector; also the scaly hide of the crocodile
4.kj: [idiom] armed, buckler, defence, ruler, [phrase] scale, shield.
4.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

4.kj: break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).

4.gl: a live coal; by analogy lightning; figuratively, an arrow, (as flashing through the air); specifically, fever
4.kj: arrow, (burning) coal, burning heat, [phrase] spark, hot thunderbolt.

4.gl: a bow, forshooting (hence, figuratively, strength) or the iris
4.dv: from H7185 (קָשָׁה) in the original sense (of H6983 (קוֹשׁ)) of bending;

4.gl: drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement
4.kj: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

5.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
5.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

5.gl: to be (causative, make) luminous (literally and metaphorically)
5.kj: [idiom] break of day, glorious, kindle, (be, en-, give, show) light (-en, -ened), set on fire, shine.
excellent, famous, gallant, glorious, goodly, lordly, mighty(-ier one), noble, principal, worthy.

5.gl: something torn, i.e. a fragment, e.g. a fresh leaf, prey, food

5.dv: from an unused root meaning to loom up;

6.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
6.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

6.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything

6.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
6.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

6.gl: probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources; an army, wealth, virtue, valor, strength

6.gl: to drop or strip; by implication, to plunder
6.kj: let fall, make self a prey, [idiom] of purpose, (make a, (take)) spoil.

7.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
7.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

7.gl: a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
7.kj: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

7.gl: a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight)
7.dv: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy);

7.gl: to stun, i.e. stupefy (with sleep or death)
7.kj: (be fast a-, be in a deep, cast into a dead, that) sleep(-er, -eth).

8.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
8.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
8.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

8.gl: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)
8.kj: abide (behind), appoint, arise, cease, confirm, continue, dwell, be employed, endure, establish, leave, make, ordain, be (over), place, (be) present (self), raise up, remain, repai

8.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
8.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

8.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
8.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

8.gl: thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you
8.dv: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel

8.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

9.dv: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty;

9.gl: to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten
9.kj: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

9.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
9.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
9.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

9.kj: appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

9.gl: judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal); by implication also strife

10.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

10.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor

10.gl: depressed (figuratively), in mind (gentle) or circumstances (needy, especially saintly)

11.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
11.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

11.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
11.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

11.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
11.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

11.gl: a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion
11.kj: that had escaped, be left, posterity, remain(-der), remnant, residue, rest.

11.gl: to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.)
11.kj: be able to put on, be afraid, appointed, gird, restrain, [idiom] on every side.

12.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
12.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

12.gl: (as noun) a circle, neighbour, or environs; but chiefly (as adverb, with or without preposition) around
12.kj: (place, round) about, circuit, compass, on every side.

12.gl: fear; by implication, a fearful thing or deed
12.kj: dread, (that ought to be) fear(-ed), terribleness, terror.

12.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
12.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

12.gl: properly, to flow; causatively, to bring (especially with pomp)
